title: ninjinentities-Unofficial
description: Added new NPCs to the DBC mod made by Jinryuu.
body:
This module is based on Ninjin Entities and is open source under a license agreement.

Model modifications and texture replacements have been made to the original, as well as additions to the model.

New characters and BOSS from the new chapter of the Dragon Ball Super manga have been added, and more in the gallery!
![all](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5e8cbe9ff0ee7ec1767e0eb106a351d14d66146.png)
